package com.fusion.core;

import java.util.function.Function;
import java.util.function.Consumer;

/**
 * Fusion Java Result
 * ------------------
 * A sealed interface implementation of the Result monad.
 * Enforces explicit error handling in the Java layer.
 */
public sealed interface Result<T, E> permits Result.Ok, Result.Err {

    boolean isSuccess();
    
    // Pattern matching accessors
    T unwrap();
    E unwrapErr();

    // Transformations
    default <U> Result<U, E> map(Function<T, U> mapper) {
        if (this instanceof Ok<T, E> ok) {
            return new Ok<>(mapper.apply(ok.value));
        }
        return new Err<>(((Err<T, E>) this).error);
    }
    
    // Side effects
    default void ifSuccess(Consumer<T> consumer) {
        if (this instanceof Ok<T, E> ok) {
            consumer.accept(ok.value);
        }
    }

    record Ok<T, E>(T value) implements Result<T, E> {
        @Override public boolean isSuccess() { return true; }
        @Override public T unwrap() { return value; }
        @Override public E unwrapErr() { throw new IllegalStateException("Called unwrapErr on Ok"); }
    }

    record Err<T, E>(E error) implements Result<T, E> {
        @Override public boolean isSuccess() { return false; }
        @Override public T unwrap() { throw new IllegalStateException("Called unwrap on Err: " + error); }
        @Override public E unwrapErr() { return error; }
    }

    // Static factories
    static <T, E> Result<T, E> ok(T value) { return new Ok<>(value); }
    static <T, E> Result<T, E> err(E error) { return new Err<>(error); }
}
